ops.note: Verified in the 2026-07-18 Track A audit: authkit ABI untouched (tree clean, 71 tests green; every consumed symbol already public in synckit v0.17 bridge); access groups byte-identical by design — old keyhelper KEYCHAIN_ACCESS_GROUP and authkit Keychain.accessGroup are both SXKCTF23Q2.com.yasyf.cookiesync.helper (authkit adopted cookiesync's group verbatim); the only blanket sweep (deleteStaleCacheKeys, unscoped SecItemDelete) died with helper/; authkit's SECache.deleteStaleKeys is tag-scoped to the authkit.cache. prefix and spares the attestation key; cookiesync Go has zero shared-group sweeps.
